product: Upcoming behavior change: Choose entitlements when adding principals to…
tagline: Databricks is changing how principals get workspace entitlements.
what_it_does: Databricks is changing how principals get workspace entitlements. After this change, you grant entitlements explicitly when adding a principal to a workspace instead of relying on inheritance from the users system group. Workspace administrators can opt in starting June 15, 2026, and the new behavior is enforced for all workspaces on September 14, 2026.
why_it_matters: Configure data governance controls for consumer users.
plain_summary: Databricks is changing how principals get workspace entitlements. After this change, you grant entitlements explicitly when adding a principal to a workspace instead of relying on inheritance from the users system group.
key_takeaway: Databricks is changing how principals get workspace entitlements.
